title: Societe Generale-FORGE launches EURCV stablecoin on Stellar
message_html: Societe Generale-FORGE launches EURCV stablecoin on Stellar ...
snippet: The French banking group’s digital asset arm expanded its MiCA-compliant euro-backed stablecoin as part of a multichain strategy for regulated digital asset infrastructure.
